crack.feature_prompt: irregular short fine mesh-like cracks on concrete surface
inspection_advice: 结合浇筑后早期养护和失水情况排查

crack.feature_prompt: parallel straight cracks or map-like cracking along the long direction of concrete
crack.feature_cn: 平行直线或龟裂状裂缝，沿构件长边方向延伸
inspection_advice: 复核养护条件、环境湿度和构件收缩约束情况

crack.feature_prompt: through crack perpendicular to temperature gradient on concrete surface
crack.feature_cn: 贯穿性裂缝，走向与温度梯度垂直
inspection_advice: 结合温差、浇筑厚度和水化热控制记录排查

crack.feature_prompt: diagonal concrete crack with wider upper part and narrower lower part
crack.feature_cn: 斜向发展且上宽下窄的沉降裂缝
inspection_advice: 复核基础沉降、支座变形和周边构件位移

crack.feature_prompt: longitudinal crack along reinforcement direction with rust stain and local bulging
crack.feature_cn: 沿钢筋方向纵向裂缝，伴随锈迹和局部鼓起
inspection_advice: 检查保护层厚度、钢筋锈蚀和氯离子侵蚀情况

crack.feature_prompt: map-like concrete cracks with loose edges and surface scaling
crack.feature_cn: 地图状裂缝，边缘酥松并伴随表面剥落
inspection_advice: 结合冻融环境、饱水状态和表面剥落范围排查

breakage.feature_prompt: shallow dish-shaped concrete spalling pit with powdering and loose edges
breakage.feature_cn: 浅碟状剥落凹坑，边缘疏松并有粉化现象
inspection_advice: 检查饱水状态、冻融暴露环境和表层强度

breakage.feature_prompt: gray white powdered concrete scaling near joints or corners
breakage.feature_cn: 接缝或边角附近灰白色粉化剥落
inspection_advice: 排查除冰盐使用、排水条件和盐蚀范围

breakage.feature_prompt: local concrete spalling with bulging and longitudinal crack
breakage.feature_cn: 局部鼓包剥落并伴随纵向裂缝
inspection_advice: 检查钢筋锈蚀、保护层厚度和空鼓范围

breakage.feature_prompt: large flaky concrete spalling with whitish or yellowish porous fracture surface
breakage.feature_cn: 大面积鳞片状剥落，断面发白或浅黄且多孔
inspection_advice: 结合火灾或高温暴露记录复核材料劣化程度

breakage.feature_prompt: blocky concrete breakage with sharp impact edges
breakage.feature_cn: 块状破损，边缘尖锐并呈冲击痕迹
inspection_advice: 检查外力撞击痕迹和局部承载影响

comb.feature_prompt: dense irregular small pits on concrete surface with exposed sand particles
comb.feature_cn: 表面密集不规则小凹坑，暴露细砂或砂粒
inspection_advice: 复核浇筑振捣工艺和局部密实度

comb.feature_prompt: honeycomb concrete with missing mortar and exposed coarse aggregate
comb.feature_cn: 砂浆缺失，粗骨料外露的蜂窝状区域
inspection_advice: 检查模板拼缝、漏浆位置和修补质量

comb.feature_prompt: rough honeycomb area with aggregate exposed and insufficient cement paste
comb.feature_cn: 粗糙蜂窝区域，骨料外露且水泥浆不足
inspection_advice: 复核配合比、坍落度和运输浇筑过程

comb.cause: 模板粗糙或脱模剂不当
comb.feature_prompt: pitted concrete surface with many shallow pinholes and rough texture
comb.feature_cn: 浅小针孔密集、表面粗糙的麻面
inspection_advice: 检查模板表面状态、脱模剂用量和模板湿润情况

hole.feature_prompt: deep concrete cavity with rough inner wall and exposed aggregate
hole.feature_cn: 深空腔，内壁粗糙且可见粗骨料
inspection_advice: 优先检查孔洞深度、范围和周边密实度

hole.feature_prompt: void around reinforcement area with unfilled concrete and rough aggregate
hole.feature_cn: 钢筋附近混凝土未填实形成空洞，骨料粗糙外露
inspection_advice: 复核钢筋间距、混凝土流动性和浇筑通道

hole.feature_prompt: large torn-edge concrete hole with mortar loss
hole.feature_cn: 边缘撕裂状大型孔洞，伴随砂浆流失
inspection_advice: 检查模板支撑、漏浆痕迹和成型缺陷位置

hole.feature_prompt: concrete cavity containing foreign material or rough layered residue
hole.feature_cn: 孔洞内夹杂异物或粗糙分层残留物
inspection_advice: 排查浇筑间隔、施工清理和冷缝处理情况

reinforcement.feature_prompt: visible steel reinforcement outline close to concrete surface
reinforcement.feature_cn: 钢筋轮廓贴近混凝土表面并清晰可见
inspection_advice: 测量保护层厚度并复核设计要求

reinforcement.cause: 钢筋位移或模板支撑失效
reinforcement.feature_prompt: exposed rebar with damaged surrounding concrete cover
reinforcement.feature_cn: 钢筋外露且周围保护层破损
inspection_advice: 检查钢筋定位、模板支撑和浇筑扰动情况

reinforcement.feature_prompt: rusty exposed reinforcement with surrounding cracking powdering and spalling
reinforcement.feature_cn: 锈蚀钢筋外露，周围混凝土开裂、粉化和剥落
inspection_advice: 检查钢筋锈蚀等级、氯离子侵蚀和剥落风险

reinforcement.feature_prompt: exposed reinforcement near honeycomb or void defect
reinforcement.feature_cn: 钢筋外露并邻近蜂窝或孔洞缺陷
inspection_advice: 复核蜂窝孔洞修补质量和钢筋包裹情况

seepage.cause: 水灰比过大或孔隙连通
seepage.feature_prompt: dark damp patch on concrete surface with blurred boundary
seepage.feature_cn: 边界模糊的深色潮湿斑块
inspection_advice: 测量局部含水率并检查混凝土密实度

seepage.feature_prompt: linear wet stain along construction joint with mold or moss
seepage.feature_cn: 沿施工缝分布的线状湿迹，伴随霉斑或青苔
inspection_advice: 检查施工缝、伸缩缝和止水节点

seepage.feature_prompt: ring-shaped water stain around embedded pipe or fixture
seepage.feature_cn: 预埋管件周边环状晕染水迹
inspection_advice: 排查预埋件根部密封和周边裂隙

seepage.feature_prompt: water droplets or thin water flow on concrete surface
seepage.feature_cn: 表面可见水珠、滴漏或薄膜状水流
inspection_advice: 追踪水源路径并复核背水面水压

seepage.feature_prompt: white crystalline efflorescence left on damp concrete surface
seepage.feature_cn: 潮湿混凝土表面残留白色结晶盐华
inspection_advice: 检查渗水路径、碱析范围和干湿循环情况
